'''âth-b-n''' ('''kathaban''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rieve|rieve]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-b-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rieve|rieve]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-b-n
|-
! Lemma
| kathaban
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithaban|thithaban]] || [[word:jithaban|jithaban]] || [[word:shithaban|shithaban]] || [[word:kithaban|kithaban]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthaban|thuthuthaban]] || [[word:jujuthaban|jujuthaban]] || [[word:shushuthaban|shushuthaban]] || [[word:kukuthaban|kukuthaban]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthaban|thuthaban]] || [[word:juthaban|juthaban]] || [[word:shuthaban|shuthaban]] || [[word:kuthaban|kuthaban]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthaban|thuthaban]] || [[word:juthaban|juthaban]] || [[word:shuthaban|shuthaban]] || [[word:kuthaban|kuthaban]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethaban|thethaban]] || [[word:jethaban|jethaban]] || [[word:shethaban|shethaban]] || [[word:kethaban|kethaban]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothaban|thothothaban]] || [[word:jojothaban|jojothaban]] || [[word:shoshothaban|shoshothaban]] || [[word:kokothaban|kokothaban]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothaban|thothaban]] || [[word:jothaban|jothaban]] || [[word:shothaban|shothaban]] || [[word:kothaban|kothaban]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothaban|thothaban]] || [[word:jothaban|jothaban]] || [[word:shothaban|shothaban]] || [[word:kothaban|kothaban]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthaban|thĂŠthaban]] || [[word:jĂŠthaban|jĂŠthaban]] || [[word:shĂŠthaban|shĂŠthaban]] || [[word:kĂŠthaban|kĂŠthaban]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathaban|thathathaban]] || [[word:jajathaban|jajathaban]] || [[word:shashathaban|shashathaban]] || [[word:kakathaban|kakathaban]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathaban|thathaban]] || [[word:jathaban|jathaban]] || [[word:shathaban|shathaban]] || [[word:kathaban|kathaban]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathaban|thathaban]] || [[word:jathaban|jathaban]] || [[word:shathaban|shathaban]] || [[word:kathaban|kathaban]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathaban|shathaban]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathaban|goshathaban]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathaban|gokishathaban]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathabanĂŒ|shathabanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathabanknĂŒ|goshathabanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathabanĂŒ|gokishathabanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathabanshĂ«|shathabanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathabankshĂ«|goshathabankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathabanshĂ«|gokishathabanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathabanro|shathabanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathabankro|goshathabankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathabanro|gokishathabanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathabanmu|shathabanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathabankmu|goshathabankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathabanmu|gokishathabanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathabansher|shathabansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathabanksher|goshathabanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathabansher|gokishathabansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathabang|shathabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathabankng|goshathabankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathabang|gokishathabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathabanya|shathabanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathabankya|goshathabankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathabanya|gokishathabanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathabanyam|shathabanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathabankyam|goshathabankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathabanyam|gokishathabanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathabanĂŒshĂ«|shathabanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathabanknĂŒshĂ«|goshathabanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathabanĂŒshĂ«|gokishathabanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathabanĂŒro|shathabanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathabanknĂŒro|goshathabanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathabanĂŒro|gokishathabanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathabanĂŒmu|shathabanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathabanknĂŒmu|goshathabanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathabanĂŒmu|gokishathabanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathabanshĂ«nĂŒ|shathabanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathabankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathabankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathabanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathabanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathabanshĂ«ro|shathabanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathabankshĂ«ro|goshathabankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathabanshĂ«ro|gokishathabanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathabanshĂ«mu|shathabanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathabankshĂ«mu|goshathabankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathabanshĂ«mu|gokishathabanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathabanronĂŒ|shathabanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathabankronĂŒ|goshathabankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathabanronĂŒ|gokishathabanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathabanroshĂ«|shathabanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathabankroshĂ«|goshathabankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathabanroshĂ«|gokishathabanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathabanromu|shathabanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathabankromu|goshathabankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathabanromu|gokishathabanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathabanmunĂŒ|shathabanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathabankmunĂŒ|goshathabankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathabanmunĂŒ|gokishathabanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathabanmushĂ«|shathabanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathabankmushĂ«|goshathabankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathabanmushĂ«|gokishathabanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathabanmuro|shathabanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathabankmuro|goshathabankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathabanmuro|gokishathabanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
